header.title: Contract Management
header.subtitle: Contracts
header.quickActionDesc: Create a new contract in just a few steps

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by contract number, tenant, property...

create.title: Create Contract
create.subtitle: 4 steps: Tenant → House & Costs → Terms → House Rules & Language
create.err400: Invalid data, or the landlord profile is incomplete.
create.err404: House or tenant email not found.
create.errGeneric: Could not create contract, please try again.

quickEdit.title: Legal fields (no HTML rewrite needed)
quickEdit.forbidden: You don't have permission to edit this contract.
quickEdit.houseFactsNote: Area, structure and land certificate number are house attributes (shared across every contract). Edit in House Management → house detail.
quickEdit.coTenantRequired: Please fill Full name + ID number + Relationship.

summary.handoverNote: Area, structure and land certificate number come from the house profile (see House Management → detail).

step4.houseLegalDesc: Area, structure, and land certificate number are pulled automatically from the house profile. If missing, update in House Management → house detail (landlord fills this once).
step4.meterDesc: Recorded as evidence for settlement/disputes — not billed via rent. The tenant registers and pays utility bills directly with the provider. Gas is omitted (most HCMC rentals use bottled gas with no meter).
step4.coTenantsEmpty: None. Click "Add" if there are co-tenants.

form.userFound: User found in the system. Some fields have been pre-filled. You can edit them if needed.
form.depositRefundDays: Deposit refund days after contract ends
form.taxFeeNotePlaceholder: E.g. Landlord covers VAT; tenant covers personal income tax; service fee 100,000 VND/month…
form.nationalityHint: You can pick from the full list in Step 4.
form.hasPowerCutClauseDesc: Contract includes a clause for power cut upon violation
form.landlordNoticeDays: Landlord advance notice days for termination *

validation.endDateAfterStart: End date must be after start date
validation.idIssueFuture: ID issue date must be today or earlier
validation.idIssueAfterStart: ID issue date cannot be after contract start date
validation.invalidRent: Rent must be a positive number
validation.invalidDeposit: Deposit must be a non-negative number
validation.payDateRange: Payment date must be between 1 and 30
validation.depositBeforeStart: Deposit date cannot be before contract start date
validation.handoverBeforeStart: Handover date cannot be before contract start date
validation.handoverAfterEnd: Handover date cannot be after contract end date
validation.copiesMin: Number of copies must be at least 1
validation.penaltyRange: Penalty percentage must be between 0 and 100
validation.passportRequired: Passport number is required for foreign tenants
validation.passportFormat: Passport number must match ICAO format (6–9 characters)
validation.nationalityRequired: Nationality is required for foreign tenants
validation.emailNotRegistered: User is not registered in the system.
validation.emailCheckError: Cannot verify email. Please try again or enter information manually.

detail.title: Rental Contract Detail

detail.error403: You do not have permission to view this contract.

confirmDialog.title: Confirm Contract
confirmDialog.description: The contract will be sent to the tenant for review and confirmation. You can still edit if the landlord requests.

resendDialog.title: Resend to Tenant
resendDialog.description: The system will resend the notification email to the tenant to review and confirm the contract.

detail.confirmSuccess: Confirmed! Email has been sent to the tenant for review.
detail.resendSuccess: Contract has been resent to the tenant for review.
detail.confirm400: Cannot confirm this contract (contract does not meet conditions).
detail.confirm403: You do not have permission to confirm this contract.
detail.resend403: You do not have permission to perform this action.

progress.title: Signing Progress
progress.step2Drag: Drag signature box onto the contract
progress.guideText: Review the contract carefully. Click Start Signing to create your signature, then drag the signature box to your desired position. Enter OTP to complete.
